faqs.question: How much does silverfish control cost in Harrison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our silverfish control services in Harrison range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What attracts silverfish to Harrison homes?
faqs.answer: Silverfish are attracted to moisture and humidity, which is common in Harrison due to its proximity to the Passaic River. They feed on starches, paper products, book bindings, and fabrics, making bathrooms, basements, attics, and storage areas prime infestation sites.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide silverfish treatment in Harrison?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Harrison, NJ. Our team can typically schedule an inspection within 24 hours and begin treatment immediately upon your approval of the treatment plan.

faqs.question: Are your silverfish treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We'll provide specific instructions for any necessary precautions during and after treatment.
